title: Buter's knives (Frozed)
body:
# What does this mod adds?

The mod adds 5 knives with skins: Classic knife, butterfly knife, M9 bayonet, karambit, and talon knife. Each of them has unique skins, such as "Carbon" for the Classic knife, "Doppler" for the M9 bayonet, and "Ultraviolet" skins on the karambit, butterfly knife, and claw knife.

# Why I should download this mod?

The benefit of downloading the mod is that it brings diversity to the Minecraft game, allowing players to use new and stylish knives with unique skins. This gives the opportunity to expand the gaming experience and improve the visual aspect of the game. Also, if you download this mod, you will encourage me to create new mods and improve this mod.

# Before downloading...

Before downloading the mod, users should ensure that their version of Minecraft is compatible with the mod and familiarize themselves with the installation instructions. It is also important to remember that using mods can change the gameplay and not all mods are compatible with each other, so it is important to be careful when installing.



**_WARNING: THIS MOD IS MADE ON MCreator, SO IT MAY LOOK TERRIBLE AND UGLY._**
